note: SEEDED KNOWN-BAD (P3, caution.md C-031). crawl-escalation force-set reachable=true whenever a page had length > 0, so a login/challenge page (which is long) flipped the site to reachable and re-enabled absence findings on junk. The crawler must classify a login-dominant homepage as NOT content: reachable stays false, nothing is asserted. Consumed by evidence/crawler/crawl.test.js.
